# Object Write Authorization (Generated)

```yaml
version: 2026-03-26
updated_at: '2026-03-26'
owner: '@team'
description: Explicit lifecycle write authorization facts for Realm objects outside the commit-envelope matrix.
scope_note: This table governs Resource, OwnableAsset, and Bundle lifecycle writes only. Binding write authorization is intentionally deferred until upstream R-BIND material is available.
object_write_policies:
  - object_type: resource
    lifecycle_surface: managed-resource-write
    allowed_operations: [prepare_upload, create_inline_text, update_metadata, finalize, delete]
    source_rules: [R-RSRC-003, R-RSRC-006]
    notes: Resource binding association is outside this table; consumption and binding safety stay governed by R-RSRC-004 plus the deferred future binding contract.
  - object_type: ownable_asset
    lifecycle_surface: ownable-asset-write
    allowed_operations: [create, update, clone, archive, delete]
    source_rules: [R-ASSET-103]
    notes: Asset binding remains boundary-safe under R-ASSET-104, but binding-specific write authorization is not expanded here without upstream R-BIND text.
  - object_type: bundle
    lifecycle_surface: bundle-write
    allowed_operations: [create, update, publish, archive, acquire, import]
    source_rules: [R-BNDL-003]
    notes: Bundle member composition is governed by R-BNDL-002; runtime binding of acquired content remains outside this lifecycle authorization table.
```

Top-level keys: version, updated_at, owner, description, scope_note, object_write_policies
